contextBlurb: New Jersey has no dedicated stablecoin statute but is actively advancing digital asset legislation. S1756 represents a key step toward a formal digital asset regulatory framework, making NJ a transition state moving from general money transmission oversight toward dedicated digital asset rules.

legislation.title: Digital Asset and Blockchain Technology Act
legislation.summary: Pending New Jersey legislation advancing a dedicated digital asset regulatory framework. Represents the state's push toward formal licensing and consumer protection rules for digital asset businesses, including stablecoin issuers.
